title: Declaration of War, Warlike and/or High-Risk Areas. In order to protect
content: 43 the seafarer from the hazards of war or deteriorating political and security situations, the 44 Department shall, pursuant to prior declaration by the DFA or other internationally 45 recognized bodies, such as, but not limited, to the International Bargaining Forum (IBF), 46 declare specific areas as war zones, warlike and /or high-risk areas. 47 48
